rationale: Both correctly diagnose the config/tokenizer mismatch (base tokenizer lacks <img_ratio_33..36>, moe.yaml forces the AR stage) and reproduce FayeSpica's confirmed DiT-config workaround. X grounds more precisely (exact line ranges, quotes the full crash snippet, explains why the 0-32 range is safe, flags the misleading 'Instruct' header on both YAMLs) and gives a concrete, justified guard-code fix, plus correctly infers the closure/follow-up disposition matching Gaohan123's request to move the improvement to a new issue. Y earns a grounding point by explicitly citing PR #2713 (which X omits), but introduces an unverified third config (hunyuan_image3_ar.yaml) not evidenced anywhere in the thread, is thinner on the concrete fix, and its 'keep-open' disposition sits less comfortably with the thread's apparent resolution.
